stemHtml: A VOR and an NDB are located in the same position. Both the VOR- and the ADF-readings are displayed on the RMI. The aircraft is tracking away from the beacons along the 090 radial. The magnetic variation is changing rapidly. Which of the following is correct?

options.a: The direction of the VOR pointer will change, the direction of the ADF pointer will not change.
options.b: Both the direction of the ADF pointer and the direction of the VOR pointer will change.
options.c: Neither the direction of the ADF pointer nor the direction of the VOR pointer will change.
options.d: The direction of the ADF pointer will change, the direction of the VOR pointer will not change.
